name: invite_user_to_channel
description: Invites users to a specified slack channel; this action is restricted to enterprise grid workspaces and requires the authenticated user to be a member of the target channel.

user_ids.description:
A comma-separated string of Slack User IDs to invite to the channel. Up to 1000 users can be specified.
Examples:
  "U012A3CDE,U023B4DEF"
  "W12345678,W87654321"

channel_id.description:
The ID of the public or private Slack channel to which users will be invited.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "C061X2Z7W9S"
